ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team within the league */,
  "franchise_id" TEXT /* Franchise identifier for historical context */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_id" TEXT /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the team's current manager */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the game was played */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" TEXT /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if it was a home or away game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win or Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "stadium_id" TEXT /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Number of innings played in the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_id" TEXT /* ID of the umpire officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the statistics */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team associated with the statistics */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the team in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the team in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the team in the game */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the team in the game */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts by the team in the game */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies by the team in the game */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the team in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the park */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the park */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of stadium (e.g., dome, open-air) */,
  "grass_type" TEXT /* Type of grass used in the park */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the park (e.g., distance from home plate to the outfield fences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the attendance */,
  "park_id" TEXT /* ID of the park where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "gate_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from gate sales */,
  "average_ticket_price" TEXT /* Average price of a ticket for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in a game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the statistics */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team associated with the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at bats by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs made by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher, outfielder) */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player in the game */,
  "on_base_percentage" TEXT /* On-base percentage of the player in the game */,
  "slugging_percentage" TEXT /* Slugging percentage of the player in the game */,
  "era" TEXT /* Earned run average for pitchers */,
  "innings_pitched" TEXT /* Number of innings pitched by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for pitchers */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for pitchers */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves for pitchers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "double_plays" (
  "dp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each double play record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the double play */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team associated with the double play */,
  "dp_count" INTEGER /* Count of double plays made by the team in the game */,
  "pitcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the pitcher when the double play occurred */,
  "batter_id" TEXT /* ID of the batter when the double play occurred */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the double play occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_double_plays_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_double_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the franchise was founded */,
  "number_of_world_series_wins" INTEGER /* Number of World Series wins by the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the division */,
  "current_leader" TEXT /* ID of the current leader team in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_champion" TEXT /* ID of the current champion team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the log */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team associated with the log */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event that occurred in the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'home run', 'strikeout') */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the event occurred */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "umpire_id" TEXT /* ID of the umpire officiating the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
